_comment: Canonical engineering-standards registry (E-80). Each rule MUST carry rule_id, severity, threshold, description, auto_fix_available per blueprint §Data Model. Modifications require a Tier 3 Architect ruling per §Security/Integrity.

rules.description: Source files MUST stay ≤ 1000 lines (warn at 500). Beyond that, split into focused modules under src/shared/ per blueprint §Core Concept Delegated Architecture.

src/mcp/** files MUST NOT call console.log() or console.info() — stdout is reserved for JSON-RPC frames. Use the structured stderr logger (src/mcp/shared/logger.js) instead. Mirrors E-48 pre-commit gate.
Staged paths MUST NOT end in .tmp, .bak, .swp, or .orig. Strip editor/merge cruft before committing.

Source filenames under src/ SHOULD be kebab-case (memory-batch-scanner.mjs) or single-camelCase (memoryCurator.md). Mixed_Snake.Case is forbidden — breaks ESM resolver case-sensitivity guarantees across platforms.

Refuse to commit obvious secret patterns: AWS access keys (AKIA…), Stripe live keys (sk_live_…), Slack tokens (xox[bp]-…), GitHub PATs (ghp_…/ghs_…), or BEGIN PRIVATE KEY blocks. Defence-in-depth alongside identity_guardian. Test files under tests/** are exempted — they document detection fixtures that must contain the patterns verbatim.

Files under src/mcp/** importing node:sqlite directly SHOULD go through src/shared/wal-flusher.mjs or src/mcp/shared/state-db.js — duplicating SQLite plumbing fragments the schema-bootstrap contract (P-13, E-79). Per blueprint §Core Concept Mandatory reuse of src/shared/.
